goal: Complete Stage 7 from the already validated public-safe T0702 diagnostic repair through the protected Beta, M3, Blue-Green, GA and Recovery gates without fixed calendar waits, while preserving every frozen product contract and zero-collateral invariant.
scope: replay the complete validated Stage 7 repair on the latest main tree
run all local, clean-tree, package, publication, supply-chain and workflow gates
deliver through a controlled pull request and merge
refresh only stale protected configuration fields without reading Secret values into logs
execute a new first-attempt protected T0702 Beta and use only the fixed public-safe phase code on failure
repair evidence-backed failures and repeat with a new exact main SHA without using GitHub rerun
after T0702 PASS, execute M3, Blue-Green, GA and Recovery strictly in predecessor order
materialize protected receipts, final Acceptance evidence and the final review only from observed results
non_goals: changing any frozen requirement, final Acceptance threshold, task DAG, Kill Criterion or canonical invariant
weakening sender verification, age encryption, remote recovery, append-only Raw or single-Timeline semantics
revealing a Secret, Gmail field, private repository identifier, exact protected count or dynamic exception text in public output
using a self-hosted runner, Codex Automation special behavior, local persistent runtime state or manual routine work
entering M3 before a real T0702 protected PASS
claiming a protected Oracle, production health, final Acceptance or publication without its exact observed evidence
validation: package, delivery-status, Governance, workflow-matrix, production-composition, publication and Secret gates
GitHub pull-request checks on the exact candidate
protected execution receipts bound to exact run, attempt, main SHA and public-safe result
remote repository recovery and Gmail postcondition verification before each phase is promoted
rollback: Every phase fails closed. Beta never mutates Gmail; M3 mutates at most one verified source only after Raw and Processed remote recovery; append-only encrypted objects remain recoverable; Timeline promotion uses strict single-writer replacement; a failed candidate is superseded by a new reviewed commit and is never rerun.
stop_conditions: a zero-collateral, encryption, recovery, private-repository identity, single-writer or single-Timeline invariant would be violated
a required protected credential or external service is unavailable after bounded retries
public output could expose a protected value
the exact latest main tree cannot be reproduced or validated
a phase attempts to bypass its predecessor protected PASS
